# comfyui_kling_motion_control (Resource)

ComfyUI MotionControl node — Kling Motion Control [api node/video/Kling]



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `character_orientation` (String) Input: COMBO
- `keep_original_sound` (Boolean) Input: BOOLEAN default: true
- `mode` (String) Input: COMBO
- `prompt` (String) Input: STRING
- `reference_image` (String) Input: IMAGE (link)
- `reference_video` (String) Input: VIDEO (link)

### Optional

- `model` (String) Input: COMBO

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier for this node instance
- `node_id` (String) ComfyUI node class type
- `video_output` (String) Output: VIDEO (slot 0)
